summary: Critical: actions/checkout@v4 (line 19) not pinned to commit SHA—explicit best-practice violation. Bash script is excellent: set -euo, quoted variables, comprehensive validation, error handling, proper array/IFS patterns. Workflow has minimal permissions and sensible triggers. Missing: fixture files (fixture/secrets.txt, fixture/params.env) and test file (tests/test_integration.bats) referenced by workflow/run-tests.sh.
